text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to computer systems that can perform tasks normally requiring human intelligence, such as recognising speech, making decisions, or identifying patterns. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from large amounts of data instead of being programmed with specific rules. Deep learning, a more advanced form of machine learning, uses artificial neural networks to process complex information, similar to the human brain. Today, AI is used in many everyday applications: virtual assistants like Siri or Alexa answer questions; streaming services recommend movies based on your watching history, and navigation apps suggest the fastest routes. It helps us save time and make better choices.
